subcodes.first_line: O Leaf of Paradise! Arise, and with the tongue of rapture sing, and with the throat of the spirit chant, and say: Lo, here am I [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقه الفردوس قمی و بلسان الجذب غنی و بحنجر الروح رنی و قولی ها انا یا
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @spiritual transformation, @presence of; reunion with God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @pain of love; love as veil
